properties.locDesc: WB US-12 from 69th Ave to I-294, EB US-12 from near I-294 to New England Ave, NB IL-43 from 99th St to Southfield Dr, SB IL-43 from 92nd St to I-294, SEB US-12 from I-294 to near I-294
